sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38877" key="e)pibakxeu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιβακχεύω</orth>, <sense id="n38877.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rush on like a bacchanal</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0484.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicostr.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
